---
title: "Regression Discontinuity"
description: "Sharp/Fuzzy RDD, local linear regression, bandwidth selection, and McCrary density test."
---

## Motivation {#sec-rdd-motivation}

*This chapter is under development.* It will cover regression discontinuity designs—sharp and fuzzy—including modern bandwidth selection methods.

### What You Will Learn

- Sharp vs. fuzzy RDD and their identification strategies
- Local linear regression and kernel choice
- Bandwidth selection (Calonico, Cattaneo, and Titiunik 2014)
- The McCrary density test for manipulation

---

::: {.callout-note}
## Coming Soon

This chapter will include:

- **Intuition** — Why a cutoff creates a natural experiment.
- **Formalization** — Sharp/Fuzzy RDD estimands.
- **Proofs** — Local polynomial bias-variance tradeoff (collapsed by default).
- **Interactive code** — Bandwidth parameter vs. RDD estimate precision.
:::
